llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to agenda announced. Board President confirmed 'Do I have any changes to the agenda this evening? None.'

items.intro_words: Okay, let's start the meeting. Roll call.
Roll call. Ellie. Trustee McAvoy. Present.
Welcome, everybody, to this special session of the board meeting.

Do I have any changes to the agenda this evening? None.
